request_payload.exposure_text: Did you see the latest NATO budget reports? Key allies are cutting defense spending by 15% this year. While we maintain our commitments, Germany and Italy are reducing their contributions to joint defense initiatives. This isn't just about money—it's about our collective security. When allies don't pull their weight, our borders become less secure. We need to ensure every member meets their obligations. #StrongerAlliances #NationalSecurityFirst
